channel.title: Detects on AI Detector — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly
channel.description: Recent content in Detects on AI Detector — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly

item.title: Detect ChatGPT Text — Free ChatGPT Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by ChatGPT (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4o). Free word-level heatmap shows exactly which sentences ChatGPT generated.

item.title: Detect Claude Text — Free Claude AI Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by Anthropic's Claude (Claude 3, Claude 3.5, Claude 4). Word-level analysis shows exactly which parts Claude generated.

item.title: Detect DeepSeek Text — Free DeepSeek AI Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by DeepSeek AI. Free word-level detection with heatmap analysis and rewrite suggestions.

item.title: Detect Gemini Text — Free Google Gemini Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by Google Gemini (Gemini Pro, Gemini Ultra). Free detection with word-level heatmap analysis.

item.title: Detect GPT-4 Text — Free GPT-4 Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by OpenAI's GPT-4. Free word-level detection shows exactly which sentences GPT-4 generated.

item.title: Detect GPT-4o Text — Free GPT-4o Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by OpenAI's GPT-4o or GPT-4o mini. Free detection with word-level heatmap analysis.

item.title: Detect LLaMA Text — Free Meta LLaMA Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was generated by Meta's LLaMA (LLaMA 3, LLaMA 3.1). Free word-level AI detection with heatmap.
